TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u hulic nu huing masatedep śÜ≤ś≥ēś≥ēŚļ≠ŚĀúśďļ kumintang atu mincintang sakamu sa u hulic nu huing mapulu tu nipi patideng nu lipuing kyu patucek amisumad tu sakahuing a hulic . itini masasudang atu milubang tu satabakiay a sabangkang sanayiay sa 10 ku tademaw yu 10ŚźćšĽ•šłä micunus tu patelacay a hulic 9 a tatademawan u katuuday ku pakatinengay . u malecaday ahulic atu malasaybangkang a patucek a hulic u tademaw papina alungucan nika patucek tu mikawaay a hulic i huing matulin a paculil patucek nu hulic u lipuing mudikec tu sapisumad tu hulic anu misulul ku tahuwakuwan sa usikining tu kuyda , nika sawsawni patinakuan ku hulic hidahida satu masatdep , mahuyahuy ku hulic inayay tu kunikasilac u lipuing kinacacay aca paydang sat u hulic melaw sa , sadikuday sa misa tabaku apaculi masasuada tu hidahida han t uku hulic . U milecaday a hulic nayi 2024 amihcaan 12 abulad 20 ademiad kinatulu amiasip masulul tu . u sinceyin patucek tu hulic maydih amana pipulu kinapina muliyaw a milubang , nika u kukumintu atu mincungtang cay pisulul tu cila amihcaan 2025 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 16 a demiad a patucekan tu . nadikudan u mincintang masakaputay misinsin a pahulak tu nipatucekan tu a hulic , panunus a mibakin . U hulic I huing nayi 2025 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 16 ademiad malingatu misinsi , nika u tahuwakuwan u tademaw caay kataneng sa kyu caay kalingatu . 2025 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 19 a demiad , u hulic nu huing masatedepa ayda macapi tu cacay a mihca nadikuda sa , mala hulic nu huing nu 114 amihcaan sakacacay nu baggu a misaybang ,2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó• 1ŤôüŚą§śĪļ pakatineng i 2024 a mihcaan u hulic sapkusu amisumad tu hulic sapisaybang nu hulic tu sakay 4, 30, 95, a hulic utulic patelac amin Śģ£ŚĎäśĖľ2024 u milecaday a tulic masippay . itawya mikukay tu yang a huing yu idaw henay u 8 ay a tademaw a huwakuwan sa ci cay-cung-cen, yang-huy-sin , cu-hu-may , tatulu kuheni u tahuwakuwan sakamusa u hulic sapikusu anupatelac ku hulic nuayawan , u hulic I huing usaudip patelac tu idaw ku sapipulu' kyu caay pilihada a patucek tu nilubangan , kyu caay patucek tu nipatucek kyu inayay kuyni .
S.PHON: u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč masat…ôd…ôp ****** kumintaŇč atu min ¶intaŇč sakamu sa u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč mapur~…ĺu tu nipi patid…ôŇč nu r~…ĺipuiŇč kju patu ¶…ôk amisumad tu sakańßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ . itini masasudaŇč atu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu satabakiaj a sabaŇčkaŇč sanajiaj sa ** ku tad…ômaw ju ***** mi ¶unus tu pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ * a tatad…ômawan u katuudaj ku pakatin…ôŇčaj . u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ańßur~…ĺi ¶ atu mar~…ĺasajbaŇčkaŇč a patu ¶…ôk a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u tad…ômaw papina ar~…ĺuŇču ¶an nika patu ¶…ôk tu mikawaaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč matur~…ĺin a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ patu ¶…ôk nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u r~…ĺipuiŇč mudik…ô ¶ tu sapisumad tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ anu misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku tańßuwakuwan sa usikiniŇč tu kujda , nika sawsawni patinakuan ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ńßidańßida satu masatd…ôp , mańßujańßuj ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ inajaj tu kunikasir~…ĺa ¶ u r~…ĺipuiŇč kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a pajdaŇč sat u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ m…ôr~…ĺaw sa , sadikudaj sa misa tabaku apa ¶ur~…ĺi masasuada tu ńßidańßida ńßan t uku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ . u mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ naji **** amińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad kinatur~…ĺu amiasip masur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu . u sin ¶…ôin patu ¶…ôk tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ majdińß amana pipur~…ĺu kinapina mur~…ĺijaw a mir~…ĺubaŇč , nika u kukumintu atu min ¶uŇčtaŇč ¶aj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶ir~…ĺa amińß ¶aan **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad a patu ¶…ôkan tu . nadikudan u min ¶intaŇč masakaputaj misinsin a pańßur~…ĺak tu nipatu ¶…ôkan tu a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ , panunus a mibakin . u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč naji **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu misinsi , nika u tańßuwakuwan u tad…ômaw ¶aaj katan…ôŇč sa kju ¶aaj kar~…ĺiŇčatu . **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč masat…ôd…ôpa ajda ma ¶api tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶a nadikuda sa , mar~…ĺa ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč nu *** amińß ¶aan saka ¶a ¶aj nu baggu a misajbaŇč ,*********** **** pakatin…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapkusu amisumad tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapisajbaŇč nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tu sakaj *, **, **, a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ utur~…ĺi ¶ pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ amin ******* u mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a tur~…ĺi ¶ masippaj . itawja mikukaj tu jaŇč a ńßuiŇč ju idaw ńß…ônaj u * aj a tad…ômaw a ńßuwakuwan sa ¶i ¶aj- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn, jaŇč-ńßuj-sin , ¶u-ńßu-maj , tatur~…ĺu kuńß…ôni u tańßuwakuwan sakamusa u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapikusu anupat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nuajawan , u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč usaudip pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu idaw ku sapipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° kju ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßada a patu ¶…ôk tu nir~…ĺubaŇčan , kju ¶aaj patu ¶…ôk tu nipatu ¶…ôk kju inajaj kujni .
S.FORM: u hulic nu huing masatedep śÜ≤ś≥ēś≥ēŚļ≠ŚĀúśďļ kumintang atu mincintang sakamu sa u hulic nu huing mapulu tu nipi patideng nu lipuing kyu patucek amisumad tu sakahuing a hulic . itini masasudang atu milubang tu satabakiay a sabangkang sanayiay sa 10 ku tademaw yu 10ŚźćšĽ•šłä micunus tu patelacay a hulic 9 a tatademawan u katuuday ku pakatinengay . u malecaday ahulic atu malasaybangkang a patucek a hulic u tademaw papina alungucan nika patucek tu mikawaay a hulic i huing matulin a paculil patucek nu hulic u lipuing mudikec tu sapisumad tu hulic anu misulul ku tahuwakuwan sa usikining tu kuyda , nika sawsawni patinakuan ku hulic hidahida satu masatdep , mahuyahuy ku hulic inayay tu kunikasilac u lipuing kinacacay aca paydang sat u hulic melaw sa , sadikuday sa misa tabaku apaculi masasuada tu hidahida han t uku hulic . U milecaday a hulic nayi 2024 amihcaan 12 abulad 20 ademiad kinatulu amiasip masulul tu . u sinceyin patucek tu hulic maydih amana pipulu kinapina muliyaw a milubang , nika u kukumintu atu mincungtang cay pisulul tu cila amihcaan 2025 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 16 a demiad a patucekan tu . nadikudan u mincintang masakaputay misinsin a pahulak tu nipatucekan tu a hulic , panunus a mibakin . U hulic I huing nayi 2025 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 16 ademiad malingatu misinsi , nika u tahuwakuwan u tademaw caay kataneng sa kyu caay kalingatu . 2025 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 19 a demiad , u hulic nu huing masatedepa ayda macapi tu cacay a mihca nadikuda sa , mala hulic nu huing nu 114 amihcaan sakacacay nu baggu a misaybang ,2025ŚĻī12śúą19śó• 1ŤôüŚą§śĪļ pakatineng i 2024 a mihcaan u hulic sapkusu amisumad tu hulic sapisaybang nu hulic tu sakay 4, 30, 95, a hulic utulic patelac amin Śģ£ŚĎäśĖľ2024 u milecaday a tulic masippay . itawya mikukay tu yang a huing yu idaw henay u 8 ay a tademaw a huwakuwan sa ci cay-cung-cen, yang-huy-sin , cu-hu-may , tatulu kuheni u tahuwakuwan sakamusa u hulic sapikusu anupatelac ku hulic nuayawan , u hulic I huing usaudip patelac tu idaw ku sapipulu' kyu caay pilihada a patucek tu nilubangan , kyu caay patucek tu nipatucek kyu inayay kuyni .
S.PHON: u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč masat…ôd…ôp ****** kumintaŇč atu min ¶intaŇč sakamu sa u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč mapur~…ĺu tu nipi patid…ôŇč nu r~…ĺipuiŇč kju patu ¶…ôk amisumad tu sakańßuiŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ . itini masasudaŇč atu mir~…ĺubaŇč tu satabakiaj a sabaŇčkaŇč sanajiaj sa ** ku tad…ômaw ju ***** mi ¶unus tu pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ * a tatad…ômawan u katuudaj ku pakatin…ôŇčaj . u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ańßur~…ĺi ¶ atu mar~…ĺasajbaŇčkaŇč a patu ¶…ôk a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u tad…ômaw papina ar~…ĺuŇču ¶an nika patu ¶…ôk tu mikawaaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč matur~…ĺin a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ patu ¶…ôk nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u r~…ĺipuiŇč mudik…ô ¶ tu sapisumad tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ anu misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku tańßuwakuwan sa usikiniŇč tu kujda , nika sawsawni patinakuan ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ńßidańßida satu masatd…ôp , mańßujańßuj ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ inajaj tu kunikasir~…ĺa ¶ u r~…ĺipuiŇč kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a pajdaŇč sat u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ m…ôr~…ĺaw sa , sadikudaj sa misa tabaku apa ¶ur~…ĺi masasuada tu ńßidańßida ńßan t uku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ . u mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ naji **** amińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad kinatur~…ĺu amiasip masur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu . u sin ¶…ôin patu ¶…ôk tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ majdińß amana pipur~…ĺu kinapina mur~…ĺijaw a mir~…ĺubaŇč , nika u kukumintu atu min ¶uŇčtaŇč ¶aj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶ir~…ĺa amińß ¶aan **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad a patu ¶…ôkan tu . nadikudan u min ¶intaŇč masakaputaj misinsin a pańßur~…ĺak tu nipatu ¶…ôkan tu a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ , panunus a mibakin . u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč naji **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu misinsi , nika u tańßuwakuwan u tad…ômaw ¶aaj katan…ôŇč sa kju ¶aaj kar~…ĺiŇčatu . **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč masat…ôd…ôpa ajda ma ¶api tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶a nadikuda sa , mar~…ĺa ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu ńßuiŇč nu *** amińß ¶aan saka ¶a ¶aj nu baggu a misajbaŇč ,*********** **** pakatin…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapkusu amisumad tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapisajbaŇč nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tu sakaj *, **, **, a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ utur~…ĺi ¶ pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ amin ******* u mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a tur~…ĺi ¶ masippaj . itawja mikukaj tu jaŇč a ńßuiŇč ju idaw ńß…ônaj u * aj a tad…ômaw a ńßuwakuwan sa ¶i ¶aj- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn, jaŇč-ńßuj-sin , ¶u-ńßu-maj , tatur~…ĺu kuńß…ôni u tańßuwakuwan sakamusa u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sapikusu anupat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nuajawan , u ńßur~…ĺi ¶ i ńßuiŇč usaudip pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu idaw ku sapipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° kju ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßada a patu ¶…ôk tu nir~…ĺubaŇčan , kju ¶aaj patu ¶…ôk tu nipatu ¶…ôk kju inajaj kujni .
